agentHook.description: Canonical HookEvent broadcast by the HTTP server when an agent reports state. Consumed by the robot window (display-state resolver) and the main window (dev panel).

permissionRequest.description: Outbound permission request from an agent. Consumed by the permission-bubble window.

permissionTimeout.description: Permission request timed out (5-minute default) without a user decision. Bubbles UI auto-hides; HTTP handler synthesizes a deny.

permissionHide.description: Rust emits this before hiding the bubble webview so the 250ms fade-out <Transition> plays before the window disappears. Consumed by the permission-bubble window.

themeChange.description: Theme id changed (settings UI or tray menu). Consumed by the robot window to reload the theme manifest.

themeUpdated.description: Theme asset on disk was rewritten (dev panel Save). Consumed by the robot window to reload from disk.

dndChange.description: Do-not-disturb flag toggled. Consumed by the robot window (pauses sounds) and tray menu (refreshes checkmark).

soundChange.description: Sound-effects flag toggled. Consumed by the robot window.

languageChange.description: UI language changed. Consumed by useSettings (subscribed via useTauriEvents).

toggleMini.description: Tray menu Mini Mode item clicked. Half-dead: Rust emits, no TS listener; pending remove in Stage B cleanup.

autoStartChange.description: auto_start flag toggled. New channel added with the SettingsStore deepening (settings ownership PR).

bubbleAutoCloseChange.description: bubble_permission_auto_close_seconds changed. Emitted by SettingsStore so the bubble window picks up changes made from the main window (closes the seam inconsistency that had this field bypassing the canonical pipeline via direct useStorage).

pendingChanged.description: Dev-only: PendingStore mutated. Consumed by the dev panel to refresh its pending-requests inspector.

syntheticEvent.description: Dev-only: synthetic HookEvent fired from the dev panel. Consumed by the robot window's resolver to drive test scenarios.

reset.description: Dev-only: reset the resolver's session/subagent state. Consumed by the robot window.

robotDebugStyle.description: Dev-only: update CSS debug variables (window-bg, sprite-bg, hitzone-bg). Consumed by the robot window.
